raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies sharp deltas with prior work (Marquez and Tan, 2021) and maps against the nearest works in the field.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (the Marquez and Tan paper), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty around the self-preference correction module.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text (unsupported superlatives, logical tension) and proposes concrete fixes.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.98
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies sharp deltas with prior work (Marquez and Tan, 2021) and maps against the nearest works in the field.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (the Marquez and Tan paper), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty around the self-preference correction module.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text (unsupported superlatives, logical tension) and proposes concrete fixes.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
